session.__ttl_hours_comment: How long to keep session affinity (in hours)
session.__max_sessions_comment: Max sessions to keep in memory before pruning

context.__management_mode_options: Available modes: static, dynamic, reservoir, adaptive, disabled
context.__static_recent_keep_comment: Number of recent messages to keep verbatim
context.__dynamic_utilization_target_comment: Target % of context tokens to aim for
context.__dynamic_min_utilization_comment: Minimum % of context tokens to use
context.__reservoir_recent_keep_comment: Recent messages to keep verbatim in reservoir mode
context.__reservoir_summary_budget_comment: Token budget for summarization in reservoir mode

routing.__comment: Ensures only one request per provider at a time, eliminates 429 errors
